page.title: Chat
page.select_prompt: Pick a conversation, or start a new one with +
page.agent_link_no_access: You don't have access to chat with this agent.

input.placeholder_no_agent: Create an agent to start chatting
input.send_blocked_toast: Message not sent — you no longer have permission to use this agent
input.attachment_bind_failed_toast: Message sent, but files were not attached. Please try again in a moment.

message_list.no_response: The agent finished this turn without a text reply.

failure.agent_error: The agent ran into an error and couldn't finish replying. Please try again.
failure.timeout: The agent took too long and stopped before finishing. Try again, or break your request into smaller steps.
failure.codex_semantic_inactivity: The agent went idle and stopped before finishing. Please try again.
failure.runtime_offline: The agent is offline right now, so it couldn't reply. Please try again once it's back online.
failure.runtime_recovery: The agent restarted before it could finish. Please try again.
failure.fallback: Something went wrong and the agent couldn't finish replying. Please try again.

stop_dialog.title: Stop this run?
stop_dialog.description_with_title: This will cancel the current agent task in "{{title}}". Partial output will stay in the chat.
stop_dialog.description_default: This will cancel the current agent task. Partial output will stay in the chat.

delete_dialog.title: Delete chat session
delete_dialog.description_with_title: "{{title}}" and its messages will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
delete_dialog.description_default: This chat session and its messages will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.

empty_state.first_time_actions: Ask for a summary, plan your day, or hand off a quick task.

starter_prompts.list_open: List my open tasks by priority
starter_prompts.plan_next: Plan what to work on next

no_agent_banner: You need an agent to start chatting.
archived_agent_banner: {{name}} has been archived — this conversation is read-only.

offline_banner.unstable: {{name}}'s connection is unstable — replies may be delayed.
offline_banner.offline: {{name}} is offline — your message will be delivered when they're back.
